caption: A news broadcast shows a group of men gathered around a long white table in an indoor setting, possibly a government office or conference room. Several men are dressed in white kurtas and Nehru jackets, with one man wearing a red cap. They are engaged in discussion, with one man gesturing with his hand while talking. The table is decorated with flower arrangements. On-screen graphics include portraits of political figures and text in Hindi. A red banner at the top of the first three frames reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", while the final frame's banner reads "2024 में JDU क साथ रहे". A lower red banner consistently states "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजय चौधरी". Small labels like "डिप्टी CM" and "मंत्री" appear near the portraits, alongside names such as "सबरात चौधरी", "संतोष सुमन", "विजय सिन्हा", "सुमित कुमार", and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार". A logo for "News 18" and a timestamp of "10:08 PM" are visible in the corner.
